title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-01
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the community metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md files.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health and usage data for all submitted projects.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot watering plants in a greenhouse, representing the automated health checks of community apps. Polly the bee is flying around helping with a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard.
